items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Rank live pre-response loop proof, provenance/source mapping, and fast honest retrieval/index freshness as the top consensus blockers.

items.title: Task outcome: Completion Reviewer 03 retrieval/LLM wiki lens: independently inspect dinobrain-data and dinobra
items.summary: Completion Reviewer 03 inspected dinobrain and dinobrain-data from the retrieval/LLM Wiki lens. Conclusion: AGREE with the index-first, graph-aware, provenance-aware hybrid retrieval direction, but DISAGREE that the current LLM Wiki is complete. Evidence: live Context Packs report lexical_fallback_v2, the data repo has wiki-index.json but no wiki.sqlite shard, current context eval fails on noise despite full recall,

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Dense retrieval now reports hybrid_contextual_v2 only when a usable dense vector index/provider exists for the query; otherwise it reports lexical_fallback_v2.

items.title: Behavior rule: Do not claim lexical_fallback_v2 is real dense hybrid retrieval.

items.title: RAG quality requires hybrid retrieval, provenance, and evaluation
items.summary: DinoBrain retrieval should evolve beyond lexical search toward contextual chunks, BM25 plus dense hybrid retrieval, rank fusion, reranking, durable source provenance, canaries, and behavior evaluation.

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Implemented DinoBrain OS v2.2.0 closed-loop compounding: finish_task can run automatic trace-to-behavior-rule distillation, cleanup invalid/duplicate behavior rules, refresh retrieval indexes, and keep auto sync enabled from installer/Codex hook config. Added verify:compounding to prove later memory search/context packs retrieve the promoted rule and memory-on behavior beats memory-off baseline.

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Critically audited DinoBrain against verified RAG knowledge and the user's desired OS using local code/data verification plus 10 subagent reviews. Produced and pushed a consensus audit report identifying P0/P1 improvements: outer wrapper fail-closed, real source/provenance lineage, true read-only/review mode, protected installer updates, real hybrid retrieval, lower-noise context eval, behavior eval, lifecycle backpressure, durable SQLite/cold memory, safer public sync, task-correlated Observatory, and release/version parity.
